description: Per-task flock prevents two workers claiming the same task, but does not prevent two workers hitting commit_task / commit_staged / remove_task on DIFFERENT tasks simultaneously. Both paths write to the state worktree's shared git index; concurrent git commit / git add / git rm fail with fatal: Unable to create index.lock. The existing concurrent_claims_local_flock test only covers same-task contention. Fix: add a store-level flock acquired for the duration of any state-worktree write sequence (commit_task, commit_staged, remove_task). Release immediately after. Lock path: .balls/local/lock/state-worktree.lock. Add an integration test that spawns N workers each running bl create in parallel and asserts all succeed. Parallelism-blocker for multi-worker usage.
title: State worktree lock for concurrent bl invocations
